\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4370 introduces Combo Cooper-Pair Capacitance Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \ket{\Psi_{\mathrm{v}}} = \sum_{n} \alpha_n \ket{n}_{\mathrm{Cooper}} \otimes \ket{\phi_n}_{\mathrm{magnetic}} \otimes \ket{\chi_n}_{\mathrm{topological}}, \]
